text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... What to do. I wonder if I can give this a
bit more oomph...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wahey, Currers! You're totes cute today! ‚ėÜ Like,
slay! ‚ô™

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waaaheeey! My aura's always, like, so open and
inviting! ‚ėÜ Amirite?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, could you share some of that aura and help
me freshen up my Umastagram post?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Freshen up? What, is it straight cheugy? ‚ėÜ

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It really is! I want you to rewrite it and give it
more punch! It's super dull right now!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna use my next post to promote my race, but
the draft's looking way too basic right now.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: That's so mid! I'm finna boost these vibes! It's gonna hit different fr fr!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much! ‚ô™ We should snap a pic together
too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm gonna post this pic. ‚ô™ Here's what I
want you to write about in the post...

text_block_list.name: @Curren
text_block_list.text:
So here's what's up! [?] Saturday is [?]
At the racecourse [?][?][?][?]
[?][?][?][?]

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Uh... I guess my phone can't display these emoji.
But what's going on with Curren Chan anyway? ...I
should go see this race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. ‚ėÜ That was a publicity success for sure!
Probably! ‚ô™
